vibe: Professional, authoritative, data-dense, architectural precision, objective.

typography.pairing_strategy: The 'Old Money Tech' variant for dashboards: Clean Sans Head/Body (IBM Plex Sans) + Sterile Mono Data (IBM Plex Mono) for all IDs, dates, and currency.

layout.grid_system: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6).
layout.spacing: Dense and compact. Use p-4 to p-6 for widget containers, p-2 to p-3 for table cells. Generous p-8 padding for main page wrapper.
layout.surfaces: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Expose the skeleton. Containers use 1px solid borders (border-border). Avoid heavy shadows.
layout.radius: rounded-sm (2px) to rounded-md (6px) for a sharp, precise, architectural feel. No heavy rounding.

components.navigation: Top navigation bar or collapsible left sidebar. Solid white background with a hard 1px border-b or border-r. Active items highlighted with a left-border indicator or subtle background tint.
components.data_table: Shadcn UI Table. Implement sticky headers. Add zebra striping (even rows bg-surface_primary) for readability. Ensure 'Verkehrswert' (Market Value) is right-aligned. Use IBM Plex Mono for 'Aktenzeichen' (File Number) and Dates.
components.buttons: Flat, solid backgrounds. Primary button (e.g., 'Datenabfrage starten') uses #0052FF with white text. Secondary buttons use transparent or white backgrounds with 1px border (border_strong) and text_main.
components.filters: Horizontal action bar above the table containing Shadcn Select components (Bundesland, Immobilientyp) and Date Picker.
components.cards: Minimalist. border border-border bg-white. Hover state: slight shadow-sm and border-border_strong.
components.modals_and_panels: For 'Termindetails anzeigen', use a Slide-over Side Panel (Sheet component) rather than a centered modal to maintain context of the grid behind it.
components.notifications: In-app notifications via a dropdown menu from a Bell icon in the top right. Use Sonner for toast notifications on success/error (e.g., 'Termine erfolgreich aktualisiert').
components.forms: For 'Klassifizierungskriterien anpassen', use Shadcn Form, Input, and Checkbox components inside a dedicated settings view or modal. Left-align labels.

motion.hover: Subtle and fast. transition-colors duration-150 ease-in-out.
motion.interactions: No bouncy animations. Use standard 200ms ease for opening panels/dropdowns.
motion.loading: Skeleton loaders for the table. When manual data fetch is triggered, use a subtle indeterminate loading bar at the top of the table rather than blocking the whole screen.

icons.style: Regular weight, matching the crispness of the IBM Plex fonts.

login_background.description: Architectural blueprint, intended to be used with a heavy white overlay (e.g., bg-white/90) as a subtle background for a login or onboarding screen.

empty_state.description: Compass on blueprint, intended to be used as a small illustration for 'No foreclosures found' or 'No filters matched' state, ideally masked or desaturated.

testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='trigger-fetch-btn', data-testid='filter-state-select').
instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts (IBM Plex Sans, IBM Plex Mono) via Google Fonts in index.html or globals.css.
Implement the layout with pure HTML/Tailwind for structural framing, using Shadcn components (Table, Select, Sheet, Dialog, Form) for complex interactions.
Build a primary dashboard view containing the Filter Bar (State, Property Type, Date) and the main Foreclosure Data Grid.
The Data Grid must use the mono_font for IDs, Dates, and right-align all currency/numeric columns.
Implement the 'Manuelle Datenabfrage' (Manual Fetch) as a prominent primary CTA button in the header or filter bar.
Use a Slide-over (Shadcn Sheet) for displaying foreclosure appointment details (Termindetails) when a row is clicked.
Create a dedicated Settings section or Dialog for adjusting classification rules and Resend email configurations.
Adhere strictly to the High-Contrast Swiss styling: rely on 1px borders (border-collapse where applicable) instead of shadows for separation.
Ensure hover states and focus states strictly follow the APCA/WCAG contrast requirements defined.
